sourceRefs: DRAFT — c2.1 technique unit: la critique de spectacle. The genre's anatomy (titre-as-verdict, chapeau, informative/narrative/argumentative parts), the comédien/acteur distinction, the critic's verdict lexicon (jouissif, roboratif, éreinter), the audience's arc as argument, nuance as credibility, dosed cultural references. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 10 'Créations' ('Techniques pour faire la critique d'un spectacle', pp. 142-143, incl. the 'Une mélancolie loufoque et douce' exemplar from Avignon 2009). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
